traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.desc: Choose a dragon type. Determines damage type for Breath Weapon and Damage Resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.desc: Replace one Attack with 15-ft Cone or 30-ft Line. DC 8 + Con + PB. 1d10 damage scaling 5/11/17 to 4d10.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.desc: Resistance to ancestry damage type.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: 60 ft.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.desc: Lvl 5+: fly speed = walking speed for 1 minute, 1/long rest.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.desc: Advantage on saves vs Poisoned; Resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.desc: +1 HP per character level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.desc: Sense origin of stonework as a Bonus Action; gain Tremorsense 60 ft for 10 min, PB/long rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: 60 ft.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.desc: Choose Drow / High Elf / Wood Elf — each has subtraits and spells.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: Advantage on saves vs Charmed.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.desc: Perception proficiency.

traits.name: Trance
traits.desc: 4-hour meditation = mental benefit of long rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: 60 ft.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.desc: Advantage on Int, Wis, Cha saves.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.desc: Choose Forest Gnome (Minor Illusion + speak with small beasts) or Rock Gnome (Mending + Prestidigitation + tinker devices).

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.desc: Choose Cloud, Fire, Frost, Hill, Stone, or Storm Giant — grants per-rest bonus.

traits.name: Large Form
traits.desc: Lvl 5+: become Large for 10 min, 1/long rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.desc: Treat as one size larger for carrying capacity, push, drag, lift.

traits.name: Brave
traits.desc: Advantage on saves vs Frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.desc: Move through space of larger creatures.

traits.name: Luck
traits.desc: Reroll natural 1s on D20 Tests.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.desc: Can attempt to Hide while obscured by Medium+ creature.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.desc: Heroic Inspiration after each long rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.desc: One skill proficiency of choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.desc: One Origin feat of choice.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.desc: Dash as Bonus Action; gain temp HP = PB. PB/long rest.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.desc: Drop to 1 HP instead of 0 once per long rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: 60 ft.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.desc: Choose Abyssal / Chthonic / Infernal — each grants Resistance + a cantrip + leveled spells at 3 and 5.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.desc: Learn Thaumaturgy cantrip.
